scripts.docker:up: docker compose down --remove-orphans && docker compose up --build -d && echo "Frontend de desenvolvimento: http://localhost:5173" && echo "Backend de desenvolvimento: http://localhost:8787/api/health" && docker compose logs -f
scripts.docker:prod:up: docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up --build -d && echo "Frontend de produção: http://localhost:5173" && echo "Health da API via proxy: http://localhost:5173/api/health" && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml logs -f
